question.string: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?
Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?
among the characters in the witcher, who has two unmarried partners, Yennefer of Vengerberg and Triss Merigold?
among the founders of tencent company, who has been member of national people’s congress?
among the other representative work of the author of hunter x hunter, which one is talking about middle school student?
On which stock exchanges are Siemens AG shares traded?

query.sparql: SELECT ?exchange WHERE { wd:Q81230 wdt:P414 ?exchange }

question.string: Apart from the book series the witcher, name all of the author’s notable work.
are brooke raboutou and colin duffy from same state of the usa?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?brookeState ?colinState
WHERE {
  wd:Q2926117 wdt:P27 ?brookeCountry .
  wd:Q87192979 wdt:P27 ?colinCountry .
  wd:Q2926117 wdt:P131 ?brookeState .
  wd:Q87192979 wdt:P131 ?colinState .
  FILTER (?brookeCountry = ?colinCountry) .
  FILTER (?brookeCountry = wd:Q30) .
  FILTER (?brookeState = ?colinState) .
}

question.string: What is the boiling point of water?

query.sparql: SELECT ?boilingPoint WHERE { wd:Q283 wdt:P2102 ?boilingPoint }

question.string: At which school was Yayoi Kusama educated at?

query.sparql: SELECT ?school WHERE { wd:Q231121 wdt:P69 ?school }

question.string: Which High School did Allen Ginsberg attend?
On which island is the Indonesian capital located?
can i play don't starve on play station 4?
How many General Secretaries of the CPSU were there before Leonid Brezhnev?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?uri) AS (?count)) WHERE {
  ?uri wdt:P31 wd:Q87004793 .
  ?uri wdt:P166 ?start .
  ?brezhnev wdt:P166 ?brezhnevStart .
  FILTER (?start < ?brezhnevStart) .
  ?brezhnev wdt:P31 wd:Q87004793 .
  ?brezhnev wdt:P40 wd:Q765165 .
}

question.string: How many different presidents of Russia have there been that took the position after 1990?
Did adam ondra win a medal in the 2020 summer olympics?
Did the Chicago Bulls win at least two seasons of the NBA championship?
Did Haruki Murakami receive the Nobel Prize in Literature?

query.sparql: SELECT ?uri WHERE { wd:Q134798 wdt:P166 ?uri . FILTER(?uri = wd:Q37922) }

question.string: Did Kobe Bryant leave the Lakers when LeBron James joined that team?
Did Rawson Marshall Thurber, the director of Red Notice also direct Titanic?
Did Venice at any point belong to the Austrian Empire?

query.sparql: SELECT ?uri WHERE { wd:Q773853 wdt:P463 wd:Q131964 . }

question.string: Were at least two of the founders of tencent educated at the same university?
Do all of batman’s partner speak english as native language?
How many spouses do head of states have on average?
Was there at least one Formula 1 event on the AVUS?
Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.

query.sparql:
SELECT ?verb ?lemma
WHERE
{
  ?verb wdt:P31 wd:Q7715 .
  ?verb wdt:P1963 ?lemma .
  FILTER(STR-ENDS(?lemma, "uş")) .
}

question.string: From which country are the beagles originally from?
From which country came the 2nd most winners of the Emmy Award ?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?country (COUNT(DISTINCT ?winner) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q7150367 .
  ?winner wdt:P27 ?country .
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 2
OFFSET 1

question.string: Does the music style of Helloween belong to rock music?
Does the postal code 32423 belong to Minden?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?uri WHERE {
  BIND(wd:Q135534218 AS ?uri) .
  ?uri wdt:P155 "32423" .
  ?uri wdt:P1376 ?place .
  ?place wdt:P31 wd:Q515 .
  ?place wdt:P18 ?image .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(str(?image), "Minden"))
}

question.string: has adam ondra been a winner of IFSC climbing world cup?

query.sparql: SELECT ?uri WHERE { wd:Q350568 wdt:P2522 ?uri . ?uri wdt:P31 wd:Q1774251 . }

question.string: has life expectancy in iran grown in any year after 1999?
has population of Isfahan increased at any point after 2006?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?population ?pointInTime
WHERE {
  wd:Q118068 wdt:P1082 ?population .
  FILTER (?population > 0) .
  wd:Q118068 wdt:P585 ?pointInTime .
  FILTER (?pointInTime > "2006-01-01"^^xsd:date)
}

question.string: Did Joe Cocker play at the Woodstock festival?

query.sparql: SELECT ?uri WHERE { wd:Q190076 wdt:P106 ?uri . ?uri wdt:P31 wd:Q483 . wd:Q991162 wdt:P483 ?uri . }

question.string: Did Udo Bölts participate in the Tour de France?
How many of Reinhold Messner's brothers still live?
In which manner did Hemingway die?

query.sparql: SELECT ?manner WHERE { wd:Q16870685 wdt:P1196 ?manner . }

question.string: In which industry does the House of Medici own a business?
How do people from Turkey call the official name of the united states of america?
How high is the Cologne Cathedral ?
How is the Harz called in Mandarin Chinese?
How many international airports are located within the city of Hamburg ?
On how many albums does Madonna perform?
On how many albums does Mariah Carey perform?
How many studio albums has Lana Del Rey have?
How many ancient civilizations are there?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(?uri) AS ?count) WHERE { ?uri wdt:P31 wd:Q83894844 . }

question.string: In how many years did Kobe Bryant receive an NBA All-Defensive Team award?
How many All-NBA Team awards have Shaquille O'Neal and Kobe Bryant received in the same year?
How many literary works did Richard Bachman write?
How many notable works does Sarah J. Maas have?
Did Bryan Evenson work for at least one university where he was educated at?
How many children (including apopted ones) does Jeff Bezos have with his ex-wife?
How many children had Paul McCartney together with his ex-wife Linda McCartney?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?child) AS ?children)
WHERE
{
  ?child wdt:P22 ?parent1 .
  ?child wdt:P22 ?parent2 .
  FILTER(?parent1 = wd:Q2599 && ?parent2 = wd:Q228899)
}

question.string: How many Chinese zodiac animals are there in total?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?item) AS (?count)) WHERE { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q27725748 ; wdt:P361 wd:Q1976204 . }

question.string: How many cities are part of the Pearl River Delta?
How many city-states are currently in the world?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(?uri) AS ?count) WHERE { ?uri wdt:P31 wd:Q133442 . }

question.string: How many businesses did Steve Jobs found?
How many countries have a democracy index higher than 7 and drive on the left side ?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?country) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 .
  ?country wdt:P8328 ?index .
  FILTER (?index > 7) .
  ?country wdt:P1687 ?side .
  FILTER (?side = "left-hand traffic") .
}

question.string: How many countries have never been members of the UN?
How many countries are on the continent of South America ?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?country) AS (?count)) WHERE { ?country wdt:P30 wd:Q18 . }

question.string: How many countries have mountains whose peaks are higher than 2000m above sea level?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?country) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?mountain wdt:P31 wd:Q8502 .
  ?mountain wdt:P2044 ?elevation .
  FILTER (?elevation > 2000) .
  ?mountain wdt:P4552 ?mountainRange .
  ?mountainRange wdt:P361 ?country
}

question.string: How many fictional dragons are present in Game of Thrones?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dragon) AS (?count))
WHERE {
  ?dragon wdt:P31 wd:Q37493975 .
  ?work wdt:P161 ?dragon .
  ?work wdt:P31 wd:Q7889 .
  ?work wdt:P162 wd:Q23572 .
}

question.string: how many emmy awards has the tv series game of thrones won?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(?award) AS ?count) WHERE { wd:Q23572 wdt:P166 ?award . FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?award), "Emmy")) }

question.string: How many films are derived from the original Ghost in the Shell Manga?
How many French kings didn't die of natural causes?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(?king) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?king wdt:P31 wd:Q838695 .
  ?king wdt:P509 ?cause .
  FILTER (?cause != wd:Q3739104) .
  ?king wdt:P3827 "France" .
}

question.string: How many public holidays does the state Bavaria have in a year?
How many literary works besides The Picture of Dorian Gray did its author write?
How many literary works did Mark Twain write in his lifetime?

question.string: how many of spiderman perfomers are citizens of the united kingdom?
how many official languages does the united states of america have?
How many official languages has Pakistan ?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(?lang) AS ?number) WHERE { wd:Q843 wdt:P37 ?lang }

question.string: How many Oscars did all the movies directed by Hayao Miyazaki combined win?
How many paintings of Pablo Picasso were ever in a museum?
How many people can play "Mensch ärgere dich nicht" at most?
How many people did Oscar Pistorius kill?
How many people died due to the Great Leap Forward according to the highest estimate?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?itemLabel (MAX(?number) AS ?maxEstimate)
WHERE
{
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q58715 .
  ?item wdt:P1705 ?number .
}
GROUP BY ?item ?itemLabel

question.string: How many people have won the Nobel Prize in Literature since its inception?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?winner) AS (?count)) WHERE { ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q37922 . }

question.string: How many people live in cities in the vicinity of the Nile ?
How many pitch classes are part of the chromatic scale?
how many plays has William Shakespeare written in the 16th century.

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?work) AS ?numPlays)
WHERE {
  ?work wdt:P50 wd:Q692 .
  ?work wdt:P577 ?date .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) >= 1501 && YEAR(?date) <= 1600) .
  ?work wdt:P31 wd:Q429098 .
}

How many positions did Kobe Bryant play in his team?
How many prizes are there established by Alfred Nobel ?
